body.title: Read remaining unread Igor Discworld books
body.result: Tagged 4 Discworld Igor-books: Monstrous Regiment (2 spine nodes + READING_ record updated), Thud! / Snuff / Unseen Academicals (new BOOK_ nodes created + reading_list entries added as pending). All tagged fiction=true, has_igor_characters=true, universe=discworld, identity_substrate=true. Full content ingestion (READ_ nodes) blocked pending book_learner PostgreSQL port — only Monstrous_Regiment.epub is available locally; other 3 ebooks not on disk. Gap noted in READING_MONSTROUS_REGIMENT node metadata.
body.description: Thud!, Snuff, Monstrous Regiment, Unseen Academicals. Voice substrate for output trainer. Tag all: fiction:true, has_igor_characters:true; igor-on-page scenes get identity_weight=0.8. See project_pratchett_igor_books.md.
